headline: Guy's Dog Starts Judging Him Silently, He Now Asks Permission Before Eating
summary: The dog has become a 'judgmental presence' that critiques his food choices with a single look.
fullBody: Jake McDog has been experiencing intense judgment from his golden retriever. 'He looks at me when I eat,' Jake said. 'I feel so judged.' The dog has become a 'culinary critic.' Jake now asks permission before opening snacks. 'The dog gives a nod or a sigh,' Jake said. 'It's very intimidating.' Jake is now in therapy discussing his relationship with his dog.
